title: quercus kiukiangensis var. xizangensis
intro: Quercus kiukiangensis var. xizangensis, also known as a variety of the Chinese evergreen oak, is a plant species that belongs to the Quercus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing oxidative stress. In traditional Chinese medicine, Quercus kiukiangensis var. xizangensis can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
